name: Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup liquid egg substitute at room temperature
Liquid sugar substitute equal to 1/3 cup sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine and sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg substitute, sweetener, and vanilla to the creamed mixture and beat for 30 seconds.
3. Stir flour, baking powder, dry milk, and cocoa into a separate bowl until blended.
4. Gradually add 1 cup water to the creamed mixture along with the flour mixture, mixing only until smooth.
5. Pour the batter evenly into a greased 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean and the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
7. Allow to cool to room temperature before cutting into 4 x 4 pieces, yielding 16 equal servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD EXCHANGE + 2 FAT EXCHANGES
CAL: 157 CHO: 16g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 9g
LOW-SODIUM DIETS: Use salt-free margarine and low-sodium baking powder.
